entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: A pest of grain sorghum, scientifically known as Contarinia sorghicola

entities.name: GRAIN SORGHUM
entities.description: The host plant affected by the sorghum midge

entities.name: MIDGE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum cultivars to resist damage from the sorghum midge

entities.name: ECONOMIC INJURY LEVELS
entities.description: The pest density at which the cost of control equals the value of the crop saved

entities.name: MIDGE DENSITY
entities.description: The number of midges per panicle

entities.name: PERCENTAGE LOSS OF GRAIN
entities.description: The amount of grain yield lost due to midge infestation

entities.name: NUMBER OF INFESTATIONS
entities.description: The frequency of midge infestations on the panicles

entities.name: REGRESSION COEFFICIENT
entities.description: A statistical measure (b-value) used to analyze the relationship between midge density and damage

entities.name: COEFFICIENT OF DETERMINATION
entities.description: A statistical measure (R2%) indicating the proportion of variance in damage explained by midge density

entities.name: PEST MANAGEMENT DECISIONS
entities.description: Decisions made regarding the control of pests based on EILs
